title: ShowerCore
description: The official extension for Hot-bath Mod! Adds functional shower heads with customizable cores, reskinable bathtubs, AOE conduit buffs, and floating rubber ducks.
body:
# ShowerCore

Welcome to **ShowerCore**! Tired of smelling like a zombie after a long mining trip? Want to gain superpowers just by standing under some water? This mod turns your boring hygiene routine into a magical, buff-granting experience.

> ⚠️ **Dependency:** This mod **requires** [HotBath](https://modrinth.com) to work properly. HotBath provides the basic bath fluids used in this mod.

---

## Features

### Showers
The heart of your bathroom. It's not just for looks; it's for power.
* **Install Core:** Right-click a Shower Head with a Shower Core (Item).
* **Swap Core:** Right-click with a different core. The old one pops out.
* **Remove Core:** Sneak + Right-click with an empty hand to remove the core.
* **Toggle:** Right-click to turn it on or off.
* **Effect:** Stand under the running water to get continuous buffs. Effects stack up over time when standing continuously.

| Core Type | Effects (10s refresh) | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Hot Water** | Speed II | Basic speed boost |
| **Milk** | Regeneration II + Removes negative effects | Cleanses all negative status effects + Saturation every 15s |
| **Herbal** | Regeneration II + Resistance II + Removes negative effects | Damages undead entities (1 HP every 2s) |
| **Peony** | Regeneration II + Luck II + Haste II + Removes Bad Omen/Debuffs | Triple buff combo |
| **Honey** | Regeneration II + Absorption IV | Saturation every 4s, provides extra golden hearts |
| **Rose** | Regeneration II + Strength II + Removes Bad Omen/Debuffs | Combat-focused buffs |

### Cores
Placing a Shower Core down as a block acts like a **Conduit** with area-of-effect (AOE) buffs.
* **Activation:** Requires specific frame blocks placed around them to activate.

| Core Block | Buffs Granted (13s duration) | Activation Frame Blocks |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Hot Water** | Speed II | Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks |
| **Milk** | Saturation II | Quartz Blocks (All types) |
| **Herbal** | Regeneration II | Moss, Vines, Leaves |
| **Peony** | Luck II | Pink Wool / Concrete / Terracotta |
| **Honey** | Absorption II | Honeycomb Block, Honey Block |
| **Rose** | Strength II | Red Wool / Concrete / Terracotta |

### Bathtubs
For when standing is just too much effort.
* **Fill up:** Right-click with a water/lava bucket, or HotBath fluids for magical effects! Hot fluids produce visible steam particles.
* **Faucet:** Sneak + Right-click the faucet part for a fun visual *whoosh* water effect.
* **Sit down:** Right-click the head or foot of the tub to relax.
* **Shared Bath:** Right-click an occupied tub to request to join. The player inside clicks `[Accept]` or `[Reject]` in chat (or use `/showercore accept_bath/deny_bath`). Players must be within 5 blocks.
* **Reskinning:** Hold **6x identical blocks** in your main hand and right-click the tub to change its texture. Survival consumes 6 blocks (only if changed), Creative is free. Works with most vanilla and modded blocks seamlessly.

### Ducks
The true boss of this mod: The **Rubber Duck**.
* **Physics:** Floats and bobs in water!
* **Interact:** Right-click to make it spin.
* **Pickup:** Sneak + Right-click to take your buddy back into your inventory.
* **Warning:** Do NOT throw it in lava. It will scream. You will feel bad.

---

## Technical

### Configuration
Tweak the mod via configuration files:
* **Activation Blocks:** Change which blocks activate the Core Blocks.
* **Steam Fluids:** Define which extra modded fluids or lava make the tub steam.
* **Duck Destroyers:** Choose which fluids are lethal to your rubber duck.
* **Visuals:** Toggle translucent particles for a mistier look.

### Incompatibilities
* **Chunk Animator:** Messes with block rendering. Causes limitations:
  * Custom fluids from *other* mods cannot be poured into the bathtub (HotBath fluids still work fine).
  * The "Duck Destroyers" config breaks, making ducks immortal in dangerous fluids.

---

## Crafting

### Items
| Result | Center | Sides (Cross Shape) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Herbal Bath Core** | Conduit | `hotbath:bath_herb` |
| **Honey Bath Core** | Conduit | Honeycomb |
| **Hot Water Core** | Conduit | Magma Cream |
| **Milk Bath Core** | Conduit | Milk Bucket |
| **Peony Bath Core** | Conduit | Peony |
| **Rose Bath Core** | Conduit | Rose Bush |

### Blocks
* **Bathtub:** U-shape layout using any wood Planks (e.g., Jungle Planks) or Stone + 1x Iron Nugget in the top right slot.
* **Shower Head:** Bucket (Top-Middle) + Stick (Middle-Left) + Planks (Middle-Right).
* **Rubber Duck:** Yellow Dye (Top & Bottom rows) + Red Dye (Middle-Left) + Slime Ball (Center) + Yellow Dye (Middle-Right).
